name: medical clinics processing 5–15 patient intakes/month tool
description: For medical clinics processing 5–15 patient intakes/month, inefficient intake causes delayed patient care. We provide a streamlined electronic intake system instead of manual paper forms and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient patient intake process leading to delayed patient care.
